2 p with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top. q with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals 12 space d e n g a n space p with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals open parentheses table row 2 row n row 1 end table close parentheses space d a n space q with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals open parentheses table row cell negative 3 end cell row 1 row n end table close parentheses
